rulings.Case Title: ALVIN RATLIFF VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Further Continuance Of Motion To Dismiss For Delay In Prosecution, Or Alternatively, To Continue Trial Date, And Or Sever Astra Flooring Company From Case
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, MARCH 7, 2008 LINE 16. DEFENDANT ASTRA FLOORING COMPANY'S Motion To Dismiss For Delay In Prosecution, Or Alternatively, To Continue Trial Date, And Or Sever Astra Flooring Company From Case IS DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS FAILED TO SHOW PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL KNEW THAT ASTRA FLOORING WAS WHAT DEDEDENT WAS REFERRING TO WHEN DEPOSED. =(302/PJM/AY)

rulings.Case Title: YEE KEUNG SIU VS. CHINATOWN ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT GROUP et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, MARCH 7, 2008 LINE 17. DEFENDANT PIUS LEE'S DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED, TEN DAYS TO ANSWER. THE COURT DECLINES THE REQUEST TO TAKE JUDICIAL NOTICE. PARAGRAPH TEN OF THE COMPLAINT ALLEGES DEFENDANTS CAUSED THE DISCLOSURE OF PRIVATE FINANCIAL INFORMATION. FURTHER, PLAINTIFF CHARGES DEFENDANTS WITH MISUSING THEIR CORPORATE POSITION. FOR THE PURPOSE OF DEMURRER, THE ALLEGATIONS ARE SUFFICIENT TO OVERCOME THE PROTECTION OF CORPORATIONS CODE SECTIONS 5239 AND 309(C). =(302/PJM/VC)
